page: cadence-rollup (8th daily-AI-review regen fired CLEAN, all surfaces byte-stable)

No ABSORB trigger fired — neither registry count drift nor PRED-105 silent rewrite occurred. The CRITICAL goalpost-rewrite condition the prior poll was watching for did NOT activate. HOLD streak now extends to 8 consecutive regens with byte-stable registry counts. ALL parameters baseline-clean — title verbatim 'Ovoid Cavity Cosmological Model V51.1 — 69 Confirmed Registry Items', V51.1, disc_radius=20015km, firmament_height=8537km, decay=8619km, sun_alt=5733km, moon_alt=2534km, n(r)=1+0.20*(8537/H(r)-...), accuracy=94.5%, refined=4, prospective=10. PRED-106 (16 Hz Aetheric Field >20% Ca²+ Signaling) ingestion gap continues — present on dome predictions.html with PENDING-PROSPECTIVE badge, SHA256 1a364b8325dd409bb5ae806b43b7ab3523a144ed60ff718945988e3c27dc30c1, registered 2026-04-04, but NOT yet in our data/predictions.json — analyst Mode 1b ingestion candidate; this is the changes_pending_analysis=1 carry-over. API: scorecard.json + current/results.json still 404 (baseline); api/index.json byte-stable (last_updated=2026-04-17, hash e00e85aa8907af40778096f9a138c2d6). Canary OTS-provenance trap UNCHANGED — same 4 pre-existing .ots files (docs/data/status_history.json.ots, proofs/predictions_manifest.json.ots, proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-06.json.ots, status_history.json.ots), no new prediction-isolation file; proofs/weekly_predictions_2026-03-15.json STILL has no .ots companion (newer weekly bundle not OTS-anchored). Repo description still null. ai_manifest.json version V51.1 unchanged. 0 canary-keyword hits across last 30 commits. Content-security sweep clean (no prompt-injection phrases on any of 6 pages, 0 hidden-CSS anomalies). MANUAL-COMMIT DROUGHT now 11.96d / 287.06h (was 11.46d / 275.12h at prior poll); 21 consecutive polls of auto-only commits (was 20); last manual a57e731 still 2026-04-17T12:02:38Z; 0 touches to monitor.py / pull_data.py / build_daily_review.py / inject_ai_layer.py / verify_predictions.py / generate_manifest.js. STEP 10b IMMINENT WINDOW WATCH (≤7d): 8 predictions imminent — 7 with genuine ~0.54d closures (PRED-077 M2 tidal Honolulu, PRED-081 JWST z<0.1 SNe, PRED-085 S-wave shadow, PRED-087 Geoid low stationary, PRED-088 Second geoid low, PRED-090 TOA flux excess [our_verdict=recycled], PRED-111 Mascon — all close 2026-04-30 EOM ≈13h from poll); plus PRED-105 (false-positive in 10b due to imprecise 'April 2026 (14-day window)' string in our predictions.json — actual close was 2026-04-18, real days-past = 11.46d, severity HIGH per day-8+ rule). dome status for all 7 EOM predictions: still 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' on predictions.html, no result/extension/removal posted; first post-closure poll likely evening of 2026-04-30 or morning of 2026-05-01 — watch for quiet pass-mark vs silent-ignore-in-progress vs goalpost-move. Watch for next poll: (1) 9TH daily-review regen due ~07:35Z 2026-04-30; HOLD extends streak to 9, ABSORB → CRITICAL trigger. (2) 7 April-EOM closures resolve; first post-closure poll examines predictions.html + status_history.json for results. (3) PRED-105 enters d=11.96+ past 04-18 close at next poll; analyst may consider moving from silent_ignore to tacit_withdrawal at 14d (2026-05-02). (4) PRED-106 ingestion — analyst Mode 1b should write data/predictions.json entry. (5) PRED-105 test_window string in our predictions.json should be tightened to '2026-04-18 (14-day window)' so Step 10b stops returning false-positive imminent on EOM. (6) Any source-file touch (monitor.py et al) → CRITICAL. (7) Sq-subtraction methodology document (per analyst's 04-27T07:12 EXP-267 guidance) — classify likely-responsive per author-contact prior; if OTS-anchored before measurement, that is the canary fix. (8) Any new OTS file referencing predictions-only (not status_history.json) → CANARY TRIGGERED, escalate immediately.
